customer_account_info.description: Information about customers purchasing goods in marketplaces and registered in merchant stores.

unique_account_identifier.description: The unique identifier of the specific customer account.

app_id.description: The unique identifier of the user if the same unique_account_identifier is used across multiple systems.

loyalty_level.description: The customer's loyalty level with the merchant. Mapped tiers: low — Silver, intermediate — Gold, high — Platinum.

customer_email.description: The primary email associated with the merchant account.

customer_phone.description: The primary phone number associated with the merchant account.

customer_ranking.description: The customer's ranking reflecting the behavior in previous transactions.

customer_reviews.description: The number of reviews registered for the customer.

last_login_time.description: The date and time of the customer's last login to the platform. Accepted ISO 8601 formats: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm.

account_security.description: The security settings of the customer's account.

last_verification_method.description: The type of verification method active for the account.

last_verification_time.description: The customer account's last verification time. Accepted ISO 8601 formats: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm.

device_id.description: The device ID or fingerprint as tracked by the merchant on their web platform or the app used by the customer.

fraud_behavior.description: Set to true if the merchant has seen any fraudulent behavior in the customer's account.

devices_linked.description: The number of unique devices on which the account has been used.

phone_verified.description: Set to true if the customer's phone number has been verified.

email_verified.description: Set to true if the customer's email has been verified.

failed_transactions_attempts.description: The number of failed transaction attempts by the customer in the last 6 months.

account_registration_date.description: The customer account's registration date. Accepted ISO 8601 formats: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm.

account_last_modified.description: The date of the last modification of the customer account. Accepted ISO 8601 formats: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmZ, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm.
